title: Lebanon reports strikes on south as Israel issues broad evacuation warnings

snapshot.title: Lebanon reports strikes on south as Israel issues broad evacuation warnings
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Lebanon reported Israeli strikes on the country’s south on Saturday as the Israeli army issued evacuation warnings for more than 20 locations including the city of Nabatieh ahead of raids there. The state-run National News Agency (NNA) said Israeli airstrikes hit several areas covered by the warning, including the villages of Rihan and Sujud, located not far from
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Lebanon reports strikes on south as Israel issues broad evacuation warnings | Arab News
